case_title: WEI, DAVIE D.D.S. VS AMIN, MICHAEL PRES.PRIMEX TALKING YELLOW PAGES,INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WEI, DAVIE D.D.S. AS TO DEFENDANT AMIN, MICHAEL PRES.PRIMEX TALKING YELLOW PAGES,INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
CERT. RECEIPT TO MICHAEL AMIN (PRIMEX TALKING) RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEI, DAVIE D.D.S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMIN, MICHAEL PRES.PRIMEX TALKING YELLOW PAGES,INC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-07-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-26-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
